2026-03-30IRCCDepartment of Citizenship and Immigration Act
Immigration and Refugee Protection ActOrder in Council Canada — New Brunswick Immigration Agreement and Newfoundland and Labrador Immigration Agreement Authorizing the Minister of Agriculture and Agri-Food to enter into an Agreement with Newfoundland and Labrador to provide federal contributions to assist dairy and livestock producersOrder authorizing the Minister of Citizenship and Immigration to enter into separate Amending Agreements with New Brunswick (NB) and Newfoundland and Labrador (NL) in order to align with the proposed Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Provincial Nominee Program).N/A
act:
Department of Citizenship and Immigration Act
Immigration and Refugee Protection Act
subject: Order in Council Canada — New Brunswick Immigration Agreement and Newfoundland and Labrador Immigration Agreement Authorizing the Minister of Agriculture and Agri-Food to enter into an Agreement with Newfoundland and Labrador to provide federal contributions to assist dairy and livestock producers
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Citizenship and Immigration to enter into separate Amending Agreements with New Brunswick (NB) and Newfoundland and Labrador (NL) in order to align with the proposed Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Provincial Nominee Program).
